---
title: "Scraping: rvest (todo)"
---

{{< include ../_extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}
{{< include ../_extensions/r-wasm/live/_gradethis.qmd >}}

::: {.callout-note}
**Proposed chapter scope:** Web scraping with `rvest`. Covers reading HTML, selecting elements with CSS selectors, and extracting structured data from web pages. Iteration over multiple pages handled via `purrr`, not explicit loops. Natural pipeline into the text analysis chapters that follow.
:::
